data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Material deliveries received', which is explicitly listed in the needs of the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms whether this requirement has been met or not. The absence of any related data or checks regarding material deliveries indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of material deliveries being recorded or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
